name: videos-workspace
title: Agent-Native Videos Workspace
description: Agent-Native Videos Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/workspace-manifest.generated.json",
  "name": "@jami-studio/videos-workspace",
  "workspace": "videos",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
  "items": [
    "jami-theme",
    "panel",
    "button",
    "media-grid",
    "videos-app",
    "videos-catchall-page",
    "videos-home-page",

    "videos-extensions-index-block",
    "videos-extensions-block",
    "videos-settings-block",
    "videos-team-block"
  ],

    "root": "videos-workspace",
    "dependencies": [
      "jami-theme",
      "panel",
      "button",
      "media-grid",
      "videos-app",
      "videos-catchall-page",
      "videos-home-page",

      "videos-extensions-detail-page",
      "videos-extensions-index-page",
      "videos-extensions-page",
      "videos-settings-page",
      "videos-team-page",
      "videos-catchall-block",
      "videos-home-block",
      "videos-c-detail-block",
      "videos-components-block",
      "videos-design-systems-block",
      "videos-extensions-detail-detail-block",
      "videos-extensions-detail-block",
      "videos-extensions-index-block",
      "videos-extensions-block",
      "videos-settings-block",
      "videos-team-block"
    ]
  },
  "plannedSurfaces": [
    ":",
    "videos",
    "c",
    "components",
    "design-systems",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "settings",
    "team"
  ],
  "shell": {
    "sourceSchemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
    "title": "Agent-Native Videos",
    "summary": "Agent-Native Videos Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.",
    "appShell": {
      "id": "app.videos.shell",
      "layout": "agent-native-template-workspace",
      "navigation": [
        {
          "label": "Catchall",
          "route": "/videos/:"
        },
        {
          "label": "Home",
          "route": "/videos"
        },
        {
          "label": "C Detail",
          "route": "/videos/c/:compositionId"
        },
        {
          "label": "Components",
          "route": "/videos/components"
        },
        {
          "label": "Design Systems",
          "route": "/videos/design-systems"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail Detail",
          "route": "/videos/extensions/:id/:slug"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail",
          "route": "/videos/extensions/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Index",
          "route": "/videos/extensions"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routes": [
      {
        "path": "/videos/:",
        "page": "page.videos.catchall",
        "title": "Catchall",
        "blocks": [
          "block.videos.catchall"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/videos/app/routes/$.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/videos",
        "page": "page.videos.home",
        "title": "Videos Home",
        "blocks": [
          "block.videos.home"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/videos/app/routes/_index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/videos/c/:compositionId",
        "page": "page.videos.c-detail",
        "title": "C Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.videos.c-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/videos/app/routes/c.$compositionId.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/videos/components",
        "page": "page.videos.components",
        "title": "Components",
        "blocks": [
          "block.videos.components"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/videos/app/routes/components.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/videos/design-systems",
        "page": "page.videos.design-systems",
        "title": "Design Systems",
        "blocks": [
          "block.videos.design-systems"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/videos/app/routes/design-systems.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/videos/extensions/:id/:slug",
        "page": "page.videos.extensions-detail-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.videos.extensions-detail-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/videos/app/routes/extensions.$id.$slug.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/videos/extensions/:id",
        "page": "page.videos.extensions-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.videos.extensions-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/videos/app/routes/extensions.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/videos/extensions",
        "page": "page.videos.extensions-index",
        "title": "Extensions Index",
        "blocks": [
          "block.videos.extensions-index"

        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/videos/app/routes/extensions._index.tsx"

        "path": "/videos/extensions",

        "blocks": [
          "block.videos.team"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/videos/app/routes/team.tsx"

    "pages": [
      {
        "id": "page.videos.catchall",
        "title": "Catchall",
        "description": "Agent-Native videos route /: derived from $.tsx.",
        "components": [

        "components": [
          "media-grid",

        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/videos/app/routes/extensions.$id.$slug.tsx"
      },
      {

      }

      "panel"

    "stateFixtures": {
      "longContent": "Agent-Native Videos keeps the original Agent-Native route inventory visible while Studio UI renders safe resident components for Harness inspection.",
      "empty": "No records are loaded for Agent-Native Videos in the local Studio UI port; the original Agent-Native data/runtime remains referenced by source path.",
      "error": "Agent-Native Videos agent or action state is display-only until Jami Harness owns the runtime execution path."
    },
    "agentNativeTemplate": {

      "upstreamRepo": "https://github.com/BuilderIO/agent-native.git",
      "sourcePath": "agent-native/templates/videos",
      "copiedSource": false,

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Agent-Native Agent-Native Videos template imported from yrka-io/agent-native as a complete Studio UI workspace shell over all discovered route files; execution remains display-only behind Jami Harness contracts.

upstream.importedAs: jami-authored workspace shell and registry metadata derived from Agent-Native template structure

compatibility.shadcn: Studio UI registry metadata generated from Agent-Native template route inventory; source app remains upstream-owned until forked into Jami packages.
compatibility.tailwind: Consumes generated --jami-* CSS variables in the Studio UI workbench port.
